name: Audrey Kawasaki
description: Audrey Kawasaki paints enigmatic young women directly onto wood panels, letting the grain bleed through the image like a memory surfacing. Her work fuses Art Nouveau's flowing lines and decorative sensibility with Japanese manga and erotic illustration — intimate, melancholy, and technically precise. Based in Los Angeles, Kawasaki is one of the most recognized painters to emerge from the Pop Surrealism scene.
